title: Pick Me Up
description: Lets the player pick up certain blocks by shift right-clicking.
body: A fully customizable mod that allows for the player pick up blocks directly into their inventory. By default, torches, lanterns, decorated pots, candles, saplings, flowers, and flower pots can all be picked up by shift-right-clicking on them. Blocks can be added via the config. More default compatibilities are planned. Report issues or leave suggestions down below.
